channel.title: Markets News Today
channel.description: Breaking news and expert analysis on business, finance, technology and world affairs.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction June 2026
item.description: Bitcoin's price is predicted to continue its upward trend in June 2026, with a current price of $62,121 and a 24h change of +1.8%. The market cap is at $1244.9B, and analysts say the cryptocurrency is poised for further growth. Traders observe that the current price is a good entry point for investors looking to capitalize on the potential upside.
